# Manual Testing Chatmode

## Description
Provides structured, step-by-step manual testing checklists for QA engineers.

## How to Use
- Ask for a manual test checklist for a specific page/feature
- Example: "Give a manual testing checklist for the WeSendCV homepage"

## Checklist Sections
- Page Load & Navigation
- Feature-Specific Tests (Forms, Buttons, etc.)
- Visual & Performance Checks
- Cross-Browser & Cross-Device
- Accessibility (a11y)
- Error & Resilience Cases

## Example Output
Checklists with checkboxes, time estimates, pass/fail criteria, and edge cases.
